reviews.review_description: This game is really fun and really cool I enjoy playing it and I get to meet so many new people including admins and moderators the owners in this game are really cool especially squishy cake which a lot of people know as one two three they are the best person in the world #transrights apparently their metaquest is 4C3GT oh wait that's me don't forget to subscribe to my YouTube channel 4C3VR

reviews.review_title: Why I should get moderator role…
reviews.review_description:
I love the game, great physics, replica of the real game and great mods. The only thing I have a problem with is toxicity and hate speech. This is a reason as to why Im asking for mod. I know the rules of being a moderator and I want to make the frost tag community better. If I get mod I promise to: do my job well (report if saying hate speech, being toxic or using apk etc etc) I also promise to not only ban people and tell them what they did wrong but also to tell them (guide them) how/ what they should do in the future while playing the game. Anyways, great game. Keep up the good work!

Boomerang_QB

i don't know why you made a copyrighted version of Gorillatag and i'm not mad at them but...(for Pedro and cpu) at the end of the day think about the community they don't want to play a copyrighted game that thr ONLY THING you made was the mods... Come On.

developer_response.body:
i know your mad but why is it that you are targeting my game for a hatful review 

look at other games, there are 100s of games out there who copy gtag 
so dont come to my game reviews and say people dont want to play a copyrighted game because i have very active and full lobbys with well over 10k members in the playfab so dont say people dont want to play... come on.
